# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe what this PR does and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / code improvement
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] CI / infrastructure

## Testing

- [ ] Rust tests pass: `cargo test --all`
- [ ] Frontend tests pass: `pnpm test`
- [ ] Typecheck passes: `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] Formatting: `cargo fmt --all` and `pnpm format`
- [ ] No secrets committed

## Security checklist

- [ ] No API keys or tokens in code or env files
- [ ] No arbitrary shell execution added
- [ ] Public intake routes do not trigger privileged actions
- [ ] Sensitive writes include audit events
- [ ] Medical record changes are role-checked

## Related issues

Closes #

## Notes for reviewers

Any context that would help the reviewer understand the changes.
